display_text: Slardar Aghanim's Scepter: Seaborn Sentinel — Enhances Slardar's survivability and map control by granting increased durability and area denial in water-based terrain, countering heavy physical damage and control spells with Status Resistance. This transforms him into a sustained frontliner and map control specialist, especially in river-based engagements.
search_text: Slardar Aghanim Scepter counter-physical anti-control map control sustained frontliner

display_text: Slardar Aghanim's Shard: Slithereen Crush — Adds Corrosive Haze to every Slithereen Crush hit, amplifying teamfight impact by providing vision, armor reduction, and debuff application in an AoE. This counters tanky lineups and high-armor enemies, reinforcing Slardar's role as a durable initiator and debuffer.
search_text: Slardar Aghanim Shard anti-tank armor reduction AoE debuff initiator
